/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libModInstaller.so -o libModInstaller.so CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/dllmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/InstallDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/InstallerDataFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/MakeIconResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/MakeInstaller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/ModInstaller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModInstaller.dir/__/UABE_Win32/FileDialog.cpp.o  ../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools_Static.a ../libCompression/liblibCompression.a ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a -lComctl32.lib -lShlwapi.lib
